image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about solar wind pressure than social media does.
Context visual: Solar wind is a stream of charged particles from the sun, pushing through space at incredible speeds.
Escalation visual: But what does that mean for Earth? Well, this pressure can affect our satellites and even create auroras!
Evidence visual: Research shows fluctuations in solar wind can disrupt communications and power grids.
Payoff visual: So, next time you hear about solar wind, remember: it’s not just a space phenomenon; it’s a force influencing our lives.
Cta visual: Want to explore more space mysteries? Hit that follow button!
